profileChoices.name: advanced
profileChoices.description: Concise, higher-autonomy profile for experienced users who want faster broadening and fewer interruptions.

profileChoices.name: beginner
profileChoices.description: Guided profile for non-technical users with stricter approvals and more explanation.

profileChoices.name: builder
profileChoices.description: Balanced default profile with premium planning, efficient execution, and bounded innovation.

profileChoices.name: experimental
profileChoices.description: Wide-autonomy profile with broader innovation scope, learned-skill visibility, and harness experimentation.

profileChoices.name: hands_free_builder
profileChoices.description: Default profile for voice-first coding with autonomous continuity.

profileChoices.name: minimal_focus
profileChoices.description: Low-noise profile for deep focus and short task bursts.

profileChoices.name: research_sprint
profileChoices.description: Research-heavy profile with broader context and parallel exploration.

profileChoices.name: safety_gate
profileChoices.description: Conservative profile with strict guardrails and verification-first behavior.

steps.title: Check local setup
steps.description: Verify WSL2, Node, Python, uv, OpenClaw, and Hermes before launching a mission.

steps.title: Choose a guided profile
steps.description: Pick Beginner, Builder, Advanced, or Experimental to set safe defaults for approvals and motion.

steps.title: Add a workspace
steps.description: Register a project so Fluxio can recommend skills, runtimes, and verification.

steps.title: Launch a mission
steps.description: Start a guided mission to see the planner, approvals, proof, and action timeline in context.

steps.title: Enable phone escalation
steps.description: Add a Telegram destination so blocked approvals and completion summaries reach your phone.

profileChoices.name: advanced
profileChoices.description: Concise, higher-autonomy profile for experienced users who want faster broadening and fewer interruptions.

profileChoices.name: beginner
profileChoices.description: Guided profile for non-technical users with stricter approvals and more explanation.

profileChoices.name: builder
profileChoices.description: Balanced default profile with premium planning, efficient execution, and bounded innovation.

profileChoices.name: experimental
profileChoices.description: Wide-autonomy profile with broader innovation scope, learned-skill visibility, and harness experimentation.

profileChoices.name: hands_free_builder
profileChoices.description: Default profile for voice-first coding with autonomous continuity.

profileChoices.name: minimal_focus
profileChoices.description: Low-noise profile for deep focus and short task bursts.

profileChoices.name: research_sprint
profileChoices.description: Research-heavy profile with broader context and parallel exploration.

profileChoices.name: safety_gate
profileChoices.description: Conservative profile with strict guardrails and verification-first behavior.

steps.title: Check local setup
steps.description: Verify WSL2, Node, Python, uv, OpenClaw, and Hermes before launching a mission.

steps.title: Choose a guided profile
steps.description: Pick Beginner, Builder, Advanced, or Experimental to set safe defaults for approvals and motion.

steps.title: Add a workspace
steps.description: Register a project so Fluxio can recommend skills, runtimes, and verification.

steps.title: Launch a mission
steps.description: Start a guided mission to see the planner, approvals, proof, and action timeline in context.

steps.title: Enable phone escalation
steps.description: Add a Telegram destination so blocked approvals and completion summaries reach your phone.

profileChoices.name: advanced
profileChoices.description: Concise, higher-autonomy profile for experienced users who want faster broadening and fewer interruptions.

profileChoices.name: beginner
profileChoices.description: Guided profile for non-technical users with stricter approvals and more explanation.

profileChoices.name: builder
profileChoices.description: Balanced default profile with premium planning, efficient execution, and bounded innovation.

profileChoices.name: experimental
profileChoices.description: Wide-autonomy profile with broader innovation scope, learned-skill visibility, and harness experimentation.

profileChoices.name: hands_free_builder
profileChoices.description: Default profile for voice-first coding with autonomous continuity.

profileChoices.name: minimal_focus
profileChoices.description: Low-noise profile for deep focus and short task bursts.

profileChoices.name: research_sprint
profileChoices.description: Research-heavy profile with broader context and parallel exploration.

profileChoices.name: safety_gate
profileChoices.description: Conservative profile with strict guardrails and verification-first behavior.

steps.title: Check local setup
steps.description: Verify WSL2, Node, Python, uv, OpenClaw, and Hermes before launching a mission.

steps.title: Choose a guided profile
steps.description: Pick Beginner, Builder, Advanced, or Experimental to set safe defaults for approvals and motion.

steps.title: Add a workspace
steps.description: Register a project so Fluxio can recommend skills, runtimes, and verification.

steps.title: Launch a mission
steps.description: Start a guided mission to see the planner, approvals, proof, and action timeline in context.

steps.title: Enable phone escalation
steps.description: Add a Telegram destination so blocked approvals and completion summaries reach your phone.

profileChoices.name: advanced
profileChoices.description: Concise, higher-autonomy profile for experienced users who want faster broadening and fewer interruptions.

profileChoices.name: beginner
profileChoices.description: Guided profile for non-technical users with stricter approvals and more explanation.

profileChoices.name: builder
profileChoices.description: Balanced default profile with premium planning, efficient execution, and bounded innovation.

profileChoices.name: experimental
profileChoices.description: Wide-autonomy profile with broader innovation scope, learned-skill visibility, and harness experimentation.

profileChoices.name: hands_free_builder
profileChoices.description: Default profile for voice-first coding with autonomous continuity.

profileChoices.name: minimal_focus
profileChoices.description: Low-noise profile for deep focus and short task bursts.

profileChoices.name: research_sprint
profileChoices.description: Research-heavy profile with broader context and parallel exploration.

profileChoices.name: safety_gate
profileChoices.description: Conservative profile with strict guardrails and verification-first behavior.

steps.title: Check local setup
steps.description: Verify WSL2, Node, Python, uv, OpenClaw, and Hermes before launching a mission.

steps.title: Choose a guided profile
steps.description: Pick Beginner, Builder, Advanced, or Experimental to set safe defaults for approvals and motion.

steps.title: Add a workspace
steps.description: Register a project so Fluxio can recommend skills, runtimes, and verification.

steps.title: Launch a mission
steps.description: Start a guided mission to see the planner, approvals, proof, and action timeline in context.

steps.title: Enable phone escalation
steps.description: Add a Telegram destination so blocked approvals and completion summaries reach your phone.

profileChoices.name: advanced
profileChoices.description: Concise, higher-autonomy profile for experienced users who want faster broadening and fewer interruptions.

profileChoices.name: beginner
profileChoices.description: Guided profile for non-technical users with stricter approvals and more explanation.

profileChoices.name: builder
profileChoices.description: Balanced default profile with premium planning, efficient execution, and bounded innovation.

profileChoices.name: experimental
profileChoices.description: Wide-autonomy profile with broader innovation scope, learned-skill visibility, and harness experimentation.

profileChoices.name: hands_free_builder
profileChoices.description: Default profile for voice-first coding with autonomous continuity.

profileChoices.name: minimal_focus
profileChoices.description: Low-noise profile for deep focus and short task bursts.

profileChoices.name: research_sprint
profileChoices.description: Research-heavy profile with broader context and parallel exploration.

profileChoices.name: safety_gate
profileChoices.description: Conservative profile with strict guardrails and verification-first behavior.

steps.title: Check local setup
steps.description: Verify WSL2, Node, Python, uv, OpenClaw, and Hermes before launching a mission.

steps.title: Choose a guided profile
steps.description: Pick Beginner, Builder, Advanced, or Experimental to set safe defaults for approvals and motion.

steps.title: Add a workspace
steps.description: Register a project so Fluxio can recommend skills, runtimes, and verification.

steps.title: Launch a mission
steps.description: Start a guided mission to see the planner, approvals, proof, and action timeline in context.

steps.title: Enable phone escalation
steps.description: Add a Telegram destination so blocked approvals and completion summaries reach your phone.

profileChoices.description: Guided profile for non-technical users with stricter approvals and more explanation.

profileChoices.name: builder
profileChoices.description: Balanced default profile with premium planning, efficient execution, and bounded innovation.

profileChoices.name: experimental
profileChoices.description: Wide-autonomy profile with broader innovation scope, learned-skill visibility, and harness experimentation.

profileChoices.name: hands_free_builder
profileChoices.description: Default profile for voice-first coding with autonomous continuity.

profileChoices.name: minimal_focus
profileChoices.description: Low-noise profile for deep focus and short task bursts.

profileChoices.name: research_sprint
profileChoices.description: Research-heavy profile with broader context and parallel exploration.

profileChoices.name: safety_gate
profileChoices.description: Conservative profile with strict guardrails and verification-first behavior.

steps.title: Check local setup
steps.description: Verify WSL2, Node, Python, uv, OpenClaw, and Hermes before launching a mission.

steps.title: Choose a guided profile
steps.description: Pick Beginner, Builder, Advanced, or Experimental to set safe defaults for approvals and motion.

steps.title: Add a workspace
steps.description: Register a project so Fluxio can recommend skills, runtimes, and verification.

steps.title: Launch a mission
steps.description: Start a guided mission to see the planner, approvals, proof, and action timeline in context.

steps.title: Enable phone escalation
steps.description: Add a Telegram destination so blocked approvals and completion summaries reach your phone.

tutorialSteps.title: Authenticate a model
tutorialSteps.description: Choose Codex via ChatGPT portal or API key, or choose MiniMax via OAuth or API key, before doing anything else.

tutorialSteps.title: Check local setup
tutorialSteps.description: Verify WSL2, Node, Python, uv, OpenClaw, and Hermes before launching a mission.

tutorialSteps.title: Choose a guided profile
tutorialSteps.description: Pick Beginner, Builder, Advanced, or Experimental to set safe defaults for approvals and motion.

tutorialSteps.title: Add a workspace
tutorialSteps.description: Register a project so Fluxio can recommend skills, runtimes, and verification.

tutorialSteps.title: Launch a mission
tutorialSteps.description: Start a guided mission to see the planner, approvals, proof, and action timeline in context.

tutorialSteps.title: Enable phone escalation
tutorialSteps.description: Add a Telegram destination so blocked approvals and completion summaries reach your phone.

profileChoices.name: advanced
